guidance: FY27 revenue growth ~15% on order book, excluding Reliance New Energy orders.
EPC gross margins guided 8-10%; O&M gross margins stabilising ~20%.
Battery storage a rising share of order intake and bid pipeline.
insights: FY26 record revenue ₹7,548cr +20%; Q4 rev ₹1,946cr, Q4 PAT ₹142cr (record).
FY26 net loss ₹296cr on exceptional/litigation items despite strong Q4.
Order inflows ₹10,062cr +43%; unexecuted order book ₹11,813cr at Mar-26.
Bid pipeline ~31 GW (India >27 GW); ~20% of new orders from BESS.
concall.orderExecution: ₹11,813cr book gives ~1.5 years' revenue; FY27 execution weighted to India utility EPC.
concall.source: Sterling & Wilson RE Q4 FY26 concall, Apr 24 2026; ScanX, Whalesbook, Multibagg, MarketsMojo

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
